name: Ubiquiti G6 Pro Entry
title: Ubiquiti G6 Pro Entry
short_description: The Ubiquiti G6 Pro Entry is an intelligent door entry system designed for modern enterprise environments, combining advanced access control with high resolution video monitoring.
description: The Ubiquiti G6 Pro Entry is an intelligent door entry system designed for modern enterprise environments, combining advanced access control with high resolution video monitoring. Built for seamless integration with UniFi Protect and UniFi Access platforms, it provides a unified solution for managing both surveillance and secure entry from a single ecosystem. At the core of the system is a powerful 12 MP main camera, capable of delivering highly detailed video with a maximum resolution of 3024 × 4096. The device also includes a secondary package camera with 8 MP resolution, enabling additional monitoring perspectives for enhanced situational awareness.

detailed_description.heading: Smart Entry System
detailed_description.text:
The Ubiquiti G6 Pro Entry is an intelligent door entry system designed for modern enterprise environments, combining advanced access control with high resolution video monitoring. Built for seamless integration with UniFi Protect and UniFi Access platforms, it provides a unified solution for managing both surveillance and secure entry from a single ecosystem. At the core of the system is a powerful 12 MP main camera, capable of delivering highly detailed video with a maximum resolution of 3024 × 4096. The device also includes a secondary package camera with 8 MP resolution, enabling additional monitoring perspectives for enhanced situational awareness.

The wide field of view, reaching up to 176.4° diagonally, ensures comprehensive coverage of entry points, reducing blind spots and improving overall security. Built in infrared night vision with a range of up to 5 meters allows the system to maintain visibility in low light conditions, ensuring reliable operation around the clock. The device also supports smart detection features, including recognition of people, vehicles, and animals, enhancing event accuracy and reducing unnecessary alerts. With its advanced imaging capabilities and intelligent detection, the G6 Pro Entry delivers a highly effective solution for monitoring and controlling access in professional environments.

detailed_description.heading: Advanced Access Features
detailed_description.text:
The G6 Pro Entry offers a comprehensive set of access control features designed to meet the needs of modern secure environments. It supports multiple authentication methods, including face recognition, NFC cards and key fobs, PIN codes, and mobile based unlocking through Apple and Google Wallet. This flexibility allows organizations to implement access strategies tailored to different user groups and security requirements. The system includes a responsive 3 inch capacitive multi touch display with a resolution of 480 × 854, providing a clear and intuitive interface for user interaction. With brightness levels up to 1000 nits, the display remains easily readable in various lighting conditions.

Two way audio functionality enables real time communication between visitors and occupants, supported by an integrated intercom and doorbell system. This allows users to verify and manage access remotely, improving both convenience and security. The device is powered via PoE+ and connects through a Gigabit Ethernet interface, ensuring stable network communication and simplified installation. To unlock full access features such as NFC and face recognition, an Access Hub and UniFi applications are required, ensuring seamless integration within the UniFi ecosystem.

detailed_description.heading: Durable Enterprise Design
detailed_description.text:
The Ubiquiti G6 Pro Entry is engineered with durability and reliability in mind, making it suitable for demanding enterprise deployments. Its enclosure is constructed from aluminum, while mounting components include stainless steel and SGCC steel, ensuring strong mechanical stability and long term performance. The device supports multiple mounting options, including wall mounting, gangbox installation, and a 20 degree wedge mount, all included for flexible deployment. An optional junction box provides additional installation versatility for different environments.

Designed to operate in challenging conditions, the system features IP55 weather resistance and IK07 impact protection, ensuring resilience against environmental factors and physical interference. It operates reliably within a temperature range of -30 to 50° C and humidity levels from 5 to 90% noncondensing. The device is powered by a quad core ARM Cortex A53 processor, ensuring smooth operation across video processing and access control functions. Additional hardware features include status LEDs, a ring button, factory reset button, and tamper detection switch, enhancing usability and security. With its robust construction and advanced capabilities, the G6 Pro Entry provides a dependable solution for modern access control systems.
